texto: This “freedom” put a proud people in chainsAnd turned free men into slaves“Independence” made us weakAnd slaughtered usIn the name of kindnessThis is democracy by the whipAnd the fear of chainsWith a whirlwind at its core
explicacao: Citação de Abdul Salam Zaeef sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “This “freedom” put a proud people in chainsAnd turned free men into slaves“Independence” made us …” articula reflexao, freedom, proud em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
